provenance.provenance_note: Upstream arc-flash calc used Lee 1982 fallback because IEEE 1584-2018 600V coefficients were null at time of computation (pending Sprint A.3 transcription). Re-run after IEEE coefficients are verified before any field use.

summary_table.designation: DC fast charger AC input 50 kW
DCFC output 500V DC to vehicle connector

assumptions: arc-flash intent consumed; per-equipment label data sourced from us-pv-with-dcfc intent
tool_call_pending_for_pdf_png: true on all labels — calc.render_label contract shipped but runtime tool not yet implemented
PV-INV-1.DC-STR-1 skipped per label_recommended: false (high-impedance PV combiner box)

rationale.chat_summary: US 480V industrial with PV+DCFC system. 4 nodes require labels: 2 DANGER (SERVICE-480V Cat 3, DCFC-1 Cat 3) + 2 WARNING (PV-INV-1 Cat 2, DCFC-OUT Cat 2). ANSI Z535.4 format auto-selected for US jurisdiction. SVG content rendered inline; PDF/PNG rendering deferred to calc.render_label runtime tool. Acme Engineering LLC qualified-person attestation + QR-code links to project safety portal.

sections.title: Input Ingestion
sections.summary: arc-flash intent consumed from us-pv-with-dcfc example. 5 nodes total; 1 skipped (PV-INV-1.DC-STR-1 label_recommended=false).

sections.title: Signal-Word Distribution
sections.summary: 2 DANGER (SERVICE-480V Cat 3, DCFC-1 Cat 3) + 2 WARNING (PV-INV-1 Cat 2, DCFC-OUT Cat 2).

decisions.label: DANGER for Cat 3
decisions.summary: PPE Category 3 → DANGER signal word per ANSI Z535.4

decisions.label: WARNING for Cat 2
decisions.summary: PPE Category 2 → WARNING signal word per ANSI Z535.4

sections.title: Content Population
sections.summary: All NFPA 70E §130.5(H) required fields populated. No 'Not computed' placeholders.

sections.title: RESTRICTED Equipment
sections.summary: None triggered (max IE was 12 cal/cm² at SERVICE-480V, under the 40 cal/cm² threshold).

sections.title: Rendering Status
sections.summary: SVG inline for 4 labels. PDF + PNG + project-index PDF pending calc.render_label.

sections.title: Compliance + Assumptions
sections.summary: Compliant. No non-compliance flags. 3 assumptions logged.

sections.title: Project Label Index
sections.summary: 4 labels total. All ANSI Z535.4. 2 DANGER + 2 WARNING. No RESTRICTED. QR codes linked to project safety portal.
